diagrams.title: Unit Cube Vertex Positions
diagrams.description: Shows 8 vertices of a unit cube centered at origin with coordinates (+/-1, +/-1, +/-1)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding vertex specification for cube modeling

diagrams.title: Cube Face Definitions with Winding Order
diagrams.description: 6 faces of cube with counter-clockwise vertex ordering as seen from outside
diagrams.purpose: Understanding face culling and polygon winding order

diagrams.title: Transformation Pipeline Flow
diagrams.description: Complete flow from model space to screen pixel showing all transformation stages
elements: Model Space (local coords) → Model Matrix → World Space
World Space → View Matrix → View/Camera Space
View Space → Projection Matrix → Clip Space
Clip Space → Perspective Division → NDC (-1 to 1)

diagrams.title: Z-Buffer Visibility Resolution
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how depth buffer resolves which colored surface is visible at each pixel
elements: Z-buffer comparison: if Z_A < Z_B, draw A
Pixel color = color of closest object
Visual: overlapping translucent cube faces with depth values

visuals.title: Modeling A Colored Cube
visuals.description: Visual diagram for modeling a colored cube
